This looks like a huge time-saver for app teams, but how you handle things like API limits, data delays, and schema changes from platforms like Apple or Google over time? Do users need to maintain anything, or is the pipeline fully self-healing? Also, how deep does the integration go, are you just syncing raw data, or do you also provide pre-built transformations/metrics (like LTV, cohort retention, ROAS) out of the box? And longer term, do you see this evolving into more of a full analytics layer, or staying focused on reliable data piping? [...] Easy App Reports

# Easy App Reports

### Trending categories

### Top reviewed [...] Raw data vs. transformations - we started as a raw data pipe, but we've been building on top of it. Today we already calculate ROAS for Apple Ads, real ASO organic downloads, revenue per download, and we pull in metadata like app titles and icons to make dashboards easier to build. With the AI layer, you can also derive basically any custom metric you need on the fly.

Long-term vision - reliable data piping stays the foundation. But the direction is making the data come to you, not the other way around. We started with Looker Studio, added BigQuery, now AI. Next up: mobile app, Chrome extension, and smarter alerts. The goal is that you never have to go looking for your data.

Thanks for the thoughtful questions! Did I reply it correctly? Let me know if I missed anything.

I think the two most well known open source alternatives are:

 Pentaho Reporting
 JasperReports

I've been looking at them previously, but honestly haven't tried any of them as my company at the time decided to go for a commercial (expensive) alternative.

Create photo reports, set tasks and assignments, control implementation. It is easy, fast and convenient:  
  
- Control the volume keys (Volume up - New report / New photo / Voice description, Volume down - confirmation)  
- Add a description of the photo, or the result of the task in voice  
- Put notes, crop, draw directly on the photo  
- Record time from exact time servers on the Internet (TV)  
- Record GPS location  
- Choose a report format - Excel, Word, PDF, Jpeg images, or XML.  
- Set tasks, use as an electronic checklist, do monitoring of prices, availability and other things.

## Easy App Reports Reviews

Be the first to leave a review. [...] # Easy App Reports

Build app dashboards with ease.

connect_once_explore_forever._1

Did you know you already have the KPIs and insights needed to grow your app? As incredibly as it seems, both Google Play and the App Store offer that. The bad news is that it’s all on their APIs.

But don’t worry, we got you. Easy App Reports handle all the technical stuff so you can have your app’s data on a nice and clean dashboard so you can focus on what really matters: interpreting the data to grow your app. Now, apps and games from 20 countries use our connectors daily.

### Here’s how companies like Mcdonald’s, Zalando, Brainly, and dozens of startups and scale-ups use it:
